title: Non Stick Cooking Pots with Glass Lid – 4.2 Quart Induction Hob Stock Pot – Kitchen Deep Casserole Cookware – 24cm, Copper – by Nuovva
features: RESILIENT STRUCTURE: Made with premium materials, this deep stockpot by Nuovva ensures long-lasting performance and even heat distribution. The thick, reinforced base prevents warping and promotes consistent cooking results. Whether you're simmering, boiling, or slow cooking, this pot delivers reliable results!

CLASSIC COPPER FINISH: The striking copper exterior adds a touch of elegance and warmth to any kitchen. The smooth look makes it suitable for both cooking and stylish serving. This premium finish not only looks beautiful but also resists staining and discoloration over time!

NON-STICK INTERIOR COATING: A PFOA-free non-stick coating lines the interior of our copper stockpot, offering easy food release and quick cleanup. Say goodbye to stuck-on messes and enjoy low-oil cooking for healthier meals. It’s ideal for both everyday use and special occasions!

DEEP CAPACITY: With its deep, spacious design, our 24cm stockpot is perfect for large batches of soup, stew, or pasta. The tall sides help contain splatter and provide plenty of room for stirring and simmering. Great for family meals, holiday cooking, or entertaining guests!

SUITABLE FOR INDUCTION STOVE: Compatible with all stovetops, including induction, the deep stockpot by Nuovva also features a tempered glass lid with steam vent which allows you to monitor your food while keeping moisture and flavour locked in!
description: Product Description Upgrade your kitchen with NUOVVA’s durable non-stick casserole pots.
